analysis_commentary: learning_rate 5e-5 → 2.5e-5 delayed but did not prevent collapse: max reached 0.90 by t=248s and 1.0 by t=485s, illegal_mass locked at 1.0 from probe 7. Halving lr bought ~3 minutes of stable-looking trajectory, then collapsed the same way. Fourth consecutive seed-driven collapse across four different parameter configurations.
